observation_text: NIFTY closed higher with volatility compressed.
theory_summary: Market behavior appears to be anchored by recent trends, with limited scope for significant deviations. Continuation remains weakly supported under compressed volatility, as observed stability may weaken if participation deteriorates.
reflection_summary: Observed continuation remains weakly supported under compressed volatility, as stability may weaken if participation deteriorates.
